name: go4-fashion
description: go4.fashion — AI-first operating system for premium fashion brands. Orders, invoicing, materials, BOM, shipping, knowledge base.

go4_mcp_url.description: URL of your go4 MCP server (e.g. https://your-brand.up.railway.app/mcp). On first connection you will be asked to log in to your go4.fashion organization — Claude will store the credentials automatically.
